name: Sweet-Sour Red Cabbage
recipeInstructions:
Sweet-sour red cabbage side dishes are very popular in Southern California.
Created by: Alpine Village Inn, Torrance, California.
Combine onion and bacon in a saucepan. Cook 2 to 3 minutes. Cover the bottom of the pan with 1 inch water. Add cabbage and top with apples. Tie cloves and bay leaves in cheesecloth and add to pan. Season to taste with salt and pepper. Add sugar and wine vinegar. Cover and simmer for 30 to 40 minutes. Just before serving, remove spice bag and add wine and lemon juice to pan. Mix cornstarch with enough water to make a paste. Stir into the pan liquid and heat until smooth and thickened.
